company.what_they_do: RedCentric (redcentric.site) presents itself as a recruitment and staffing agency, describing itself as offering 'Professional Recruitment & Staffing Solutions Worldwide' with a focus on 'Strategic hiring for long-term business growth.' Beyond the homepage tagline, no deeper service pages, team pages, case studies, or 'about' content were publicly accessible or indexed. The site is sparse and very newly established (no meaningful content beyond the headline). NOTE: This entity is NOT the well-known UK managed service provider Redcentric PLC (redcentricplc.com), which is a publicly listed IT/cloud/network MSP headquartered in Harrogate, UK.
raw_notes: Domain redcentric.site resolves to a page titled 'RedCentric | Recruitment Agency'.
Homepage copy: 'Professional Recruitment & Staffing Solutions Worldwide · Strategic hiring for long-term business growth.' No further indexed content found.
No 'About', 'Services', 'Team', or 'Contact' pages were returned in search results.
The domain is '.site' TLD — not .com or .co.uk — which is atypical for an established agency. Site appears very new or thin.
The email username 'admamjames' is unusual (possible typo of 'adamjames' or 'admin+james'); could be an admin/ops account or a personal account with a typo.

redcentricplc.com is a separate, unrelated company — a major UK IT managed services provider (MSP) founded in 1997, publicly listed on the London Stock Exchange (LON:RCN), headquartered in Harrogate with ~450 staff. They do cloud, networking, cybersecurity, managed services for public and private sector. Annual revenue ~$205M (2026). This company should NOT be confused with the signup entity.
No news, social presence, press mentions, or third-party reviews found for redcentric.site specifically.
